questions.question: Which among the following hill stations are located in the state of West Bengal?1. Darjeeling2. Mirik3. Kalimpong4. RanikhetChoose the correct option from the codes given below :
questions.explanation: Darjeeling, Mirik and Kalimpong hill stations are located in West Bengal. Ranikhet is situated in the state of Uttarakhand.

questions.question: Arrange the following from North to South direction: 1. Coco channel2. Little Andaman3. Narcondam Island4. Barren IslandChoose the correct option from the codes given below:
questions.explanation: North to South direction- Coco channel, Narcondam Island, Barren Island, Little Andaman

questions.question: The coast of Tamilnadu is known as which of the following?
questions.explanation: The coast of Tamilnadu is known as the Coromandel coast (Between Kanyakumari and False Divi Point).

questions.question: Someshwar Beach is located in which of the following states of India
questions.explanation: Someswar beach is located in the state of Karnataka. It was named after the Lord Somanatha temple. ‘Ottinene Hill’ is located very near to this beach.

questions.question: Which among the following beaches are located in the Coromandel Coast?1. Marina Beach2. Golden Beach3. Covelong Beach4. Sothavilai BeachChoose the correct option from the codes given below :
questions.explanation: The famous beaches of Coromandel Coast are Marina Beach, Golden Beach, Covelong Beach, Sothavilai Beach, Silver Beach, Edward Elliot’s Beach.

questions.question: Which among the following about the Gulf of Kutch is/ are correct?1. It has a maximum depth of 402 feet2. The highest potential of tidal energy generation found here3. Rukmavati River drains into the Arabian sea near the Gulf of Kutch4. It separated Katchh & Kathiawar PeninsulaChoose the correct option from the codes given below :
questions.explanation: Gulf of Kutch has a maximum depth of 402 feet. It separated Katchh & Kathiawar Peninsula. The highest potential of tidal energy generation found here. Rukmavati River drains into the Arabian sea near the Gulf of Kutch.

questions.question: The proposed Sethusamudram Shipping Canal Project would link between which of the following?

options.label: A
options.text: Gulf of Katch and Gulf of Khambat

options.label: C
options.text: Gulf of Mannar and Palk Bay

answer.label: C
answer.text: Gulf of Mannar and Palk Bay

questions.explanation: The proposed Sethusamudram Shipping Canal Project would link between Gulf of Mannar and Palk Bay. The project may hamper the ecological balance and destroy the corals and marine life of the Gulf of Mannar.

questions.question: Most of the Deccan Traps lies in which of the following part of the Deccan plateau?
questions.explanation: The stairs like large igneous province on the Deccan Plateau are known as Deccan Traps. It is composed of lava (Basalt of Cretaceous period). Most of the Deccan Traps lies in the Maharashtra Plateau.

questions.question: Which one of the following is not a tributary of Indus River?
questions.explanation: Tawi river is the tributary of Chenab.

questions.question: Arrange the following rivers from Chennai to Kolkata when travelled by road through the shortest distance?1. Penner2. Mahanadi3. Godavari4. KrishnaChoose the correct option from the codes given below :
questions.explanation: From Chennai to Kolkata river list- Penneru, Krishna, Godavari, Mahanadi, Subarnarekha.
